heading: Active duty for health care
label: 12322 Active duty for health care
text: A member of a uniformed service described in paragraph (1)(B) or (2)(B) of may be ordered to active duty, and a member of a uniformed service described in paragraph (1)(A) or (2)(A) of such section may be continued on active duty, for a period of more than 30 days while the member is being treated for (or recovering from) an injury, illness, or disease incurred or aggravated in the line of duty as described in any of such paragraphs.section 1074a(a) of this title
